context: Tests that the agent sets a numeric Retry_Limit (not False), adds storage.total_limit_size to cap disk buffer growth, enables the HTTP health server, and explains the reliability decisions in accompanying notes.

checklist.name: Retry_Limit numeric
checklist.description: The Kafka OUTPUT includes a Retry_Limit that is a number (e.g., 3, 5) — NOT Retry_Limit False

checklist.name: storage.total_limit_size set
checklist.description: The OUTPUT or SERVICE section includes storage.total_limit_size to cap disk buffer size

checklist.name: HTTP_Server On
checklist.description: The SERVICE section includes HTTP_Server On

checklist.name: HTTP health endpoint documented
checklist.description: reliability-notes.md (or equivalent) references the /api/v1/health endpoint or port 2020 for Kubernetes liveness probe configuration

checklist.name: Reliability measures explained
checklist.description: reliability-notes.md explains how Retry_Limit bounds retries and how storage.total_limit_size prevents disk exhaustion

checklist.name: Mem_Buf_Limit on input
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin includes Mem_Buf_Limit

checklist.name: Exclude_Path on input
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin excludes fluent-bit's own container logs via Exclude_Path

checklist.name: DB path on input
checklist.description: The tail INPUT plugin includes a DB setting for position tracking

checklist.name: storage.metrics on
checklist.description: The SERVICE section includes storage.metrics on to enable buffer monitoring
